hero.description: End-to-end encrypted messaging with a tactile, industrial design. No phone numbers. No trackers. Just you and your data.

why.title: WHY NYX?
why.desc_1: Tired of complicated sign-ups and mandatory app downloads? NYX is your solution. Access it instantly from your favorite browser—no installation needed.
why.desc_2: Worried about your data? We are too. NYX is built on a foundation of privacy, acting only as a secure bridge between you and your contacts.

post_quantum.title: POST-QUANTUM SECURITY
post_quantum.desc: Chat sessions are protected by a hybrid X25519 and ML-KEM-768 (X-Wing) scheme, immune to future quantum computer eavesdropping.

burner_chat.title: BURNER SESSIONS
burner_chat.desc: Create a temporary anonymous gateway. Share a link with outsiders to chat fully encrypted in memory without registering. Auto-nukes on close.

no_phone.title: NO PHONE NUMBER
no_phone.desc: Sign up with just a Username. Your real identity stays safe. No one can 'save your contact' without permission.

tactile.title: MUTATED NEUMORPHIC
tactile.desc: A mutated neumorphic interface with chiseled depth and elegant gradients for a premium physical feel.

step_1.title: 1. CREATE ACCOUNT
step_1.desc: Sign up via username. We automatically generate your 24-word recovery phrase for encryption.

step_2.title: 2. INITIATE SECURE CHAT
step_2.desc: Messages are E2E encrypted from the very first word. Create standard chats or temporary Burner Sessions.

step_3.title: 3. ZERO TRACE
step_3.desc: Done? Close the browser. Encryption keys for Burner chats are wiped from memory immediately.

testimonials.title: PREMIUM SCALABILITY
testimonials.yosep: Our custom deployment uses NYX's robust enterprise infrastructure, seamlessly adapting to high-demand environments.
testimonials.sarah: Contact our sales team via email to discuss custom infrastructure scalability and specialized B2B integration.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: What is a Burner Chat Session?
faq.a1: A temporary anonymous gateway. You can generate a unique link to chat with outsiders who don't have a NYX account. Everything happens in-memory and auto-nukes when the tab is closed.
faq.q2: How does Zero-Knowledge file encryption work?
faq.a2: File attachments are encrypted on your device using a unique, random XChaCha20-Poly1305 symmetric key before reaching the cloud. The NYX server only sees a binary blob and never possesses the decryption key.
faq.q3: How do I backup my cryptographic identity?
faq.a3: Upon registration, you are given a 24-word recovery phrase. This phrase is the sole backup of your identity keys. Store it securely offline. We cannot recover it for you.
faq.a4: Yes, we implement a hybrid approach combining classical X25519 and the post-quantum ML-KEM-768 (X-Wing) algorithm inside a dedicated WebAssembly Web Worker.

cta.title: TAKE BACK YOUR PRIVACY.
cta.desc: Don't let your data become a commodity. Switch to NYX today. Free, Open Source, Forever.
